title: Multi-Modal Agents
description: Building agents that see, hear, and generate across text, images, audio, and video

lessons.title: Why Multi-Modal Agents?
lessons.description: Beyond text: why real-world agent tasks require vision, audio, and cross-modal reasoning

lessons.title: Vision-Language Agents
lessons.description: Agents that understand images and screenshots: document parsing, UI understanding, visual QA

lessons.title: Audio and Speech Agents
lessons.description: Voice-driven agents: speech-to-text, text-to-speech, real-time conversation, and audio analysis

lessons.title: Image and Video Generation
lessons.description: Agents that create visual content: integrating DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, and video models

lessons.title: Cross-Modal Reasoning
lessons.description: Combining modalities: agents that see a chart, describe it, and answer questions about it

lessons.title: Multi-Modal Tool Use
lessons.description: Screen capture, browser interaction, camera input, and file-type-aware processing

lessons.title: Multi-Modal Lab
lessons.description: Hands-on: build an agent that analyzes images, generates reports, and narrates with speech
